perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a graphic title card featuring the Costco logo and the dates 09/29-10/05. (2) A rapid series of shots follows, each showcasing a different product on Costco's shelves or in its refrigerated section. Items include bottled drinks, packaged meats, seafood, snacks, clothing, and home appliances. (3) Hands are seen intermittently reaching for or pointing at items. (4) The editing is extremely fast-paced, with transitions occurring every few seconds to a new product display.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat background music with a fast tempo starts immediately and persists throughout the video. (2) A male narrator provides continuous, rapid-fire commentary in Mandarin, naming each product and its discounted price. (3) The audio is professionally mixed, with the narration clearly layered over the background track. (4) No significant ambient store noise or sound effects are present, maintaining a studio-like quality.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative text: "COSTCO WHOLESALE 好市多 每週特價速報 09/29~10/05 記得追蹤我們" (Costco Weekly Special Report, remember to follow us). (2) Functional text appears for every product, listing the item name, original price, discount amount, and final special price, e.g., "可可可樂寶特瓶 920ml*12 原價329 -66 特價263". (3) Emotional tone of the text is urgent and promotional, using bold colors and large fonts to emphasize savings.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Continuous rapid-fire product and price showcase -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male hand seen interacting with products, 1 blurred female shopper in background

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Varying aisles of a Costco warehouse, including the refrigerated section, clothing racks, and housewares shelves.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To drive store traffic and sales by providing a high-speed, informational summary of current weekly discounts at Costco Taiwan, targeting value-conscious shoppers with a sense of urgency.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of products, prices, and branding within a specific retail environment (Costco).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Rapid-fire price narration and high-density text overlays tailored for short-form social media consumption.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video mimics the style of viral 'bargain hunting' or 'weekly deals' content popular on platforms like TikTok and Instagram Reels.
